def positive_context_manager_yields_global_mutable_resource():
    rule_id = "context_manager_yields_global_mutable_resource"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag context managers that expose a shared global mutable resource while implying call-local ownership."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
